labels.ideal_content_profile: Slow-build then explosive-drop reveal sequences — unboxings, transformations, product launches with hard beat-locked payoffs.
Sneaker unboxings, fit-check walks, fashion close-ups with peaks_high hits on reveal beats.
Product launches, sneaker drops, lookbook-style reveals with bright high-contrast color.
Slow-build reveals — vintage cars, watches, artisan products with dramatic side-lighting.
Slow handheld emotional b-roll, family memories.

raw_text: {"ranked": [{"track_id": "track_electronic_drop", "score": 9.4, "rationale": "Build-and-drop electronic with peaks_high energy is the literal mechanic this content needs — the slow unbox build into the on-beat reveal is exactly this track's profile, beat_pulse transitions would land the drop frame.", "predicted_strengths": ["peaks_high energy synced to the reveal beat", "beat_pulse transitions land on the box-lift moment", "12 slots over 4 clips supports build-then-cascade structure"]}, {"track_id": "track_hiphop_flex", "score": 8.8, "rationale": "Fit-check flex hip-hop names sneaker unboxings and fit walks directly; peaks_high energy delivers the reveal punch and lace-up rhythm without the synthetic edge of the electronic top pick.", "predicted_strengths": ["saturated street grade matches the alley fit-walk clip", "hard-cut transitions land the lacing rhythm", "swagger vibe reads against 'ten years waiting' hook"]}, {"track_id": "track_pop_glossy", "score": 8.3, "rationale": "Glossy headline-release pop frames the same content as a polished product-launch reveal; distinct enough from the electronic and hip-hop picks to round out the top-K with a third register.", "predicted_strengths": ["distinct vibe from top two — adds top-K variety", "high-contrast neon grade aligns with dramatic side-lighting", "whip_pan transitions fit the tracking-shot fit walk"]}, {"track_id": "track_cinematic_unbox", "score": 7.0, "rationale": "Heirloom-reveal cinematic frames the unbox as artisan ritual — works for the slow-build first clip, less for the fast lace-up and alley walk.", "predicted_strengths": ["reverent vibe elevates the macro unbox shot", "warm amber grade aligns with the box-lift lighting"]}, {"track_id": "track_acoustic_calm", "score": 1.5, "rationale": "Slow wistful acoustic is the textbook wrong call on a build-and-drop reveal — destroys the beat-locked reveal payoff the content depends on.", "predicted_strengths": ["no real fit"]}]}
